{{Quote|Anything for Solo-my-friend. Are we not soulsealed buddies, you, me, and the Big One here, this Wookiee?|Fadoop, to Han Solo|<ref name="hll" />}}
'''Fadoop''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Saheelindeeli]] who, during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], worked as a local wheeler-dealer on her home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Saheelindeel]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]]. Working out of a cobbled-together [[Starship/Legends|ship]] she called ''[[Skybarge]]'', Fadoop was both unusually overweight and outgoing for her [[Species/Legends|species]], doing much of her business with offworld visitors. In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] Fadoop became an acquaintance of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who visited Saheelindeel while working as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] on [[Grigmin's Traveling Airshow]]. Fadoop developed a friendly relationship with Solo and his [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], trading parts with the offworlders in between cargo deliveries. Fadoop even allowed Solo to borrow her ship when Solo decided to quit his job working for the hotshot [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Grigmin]], using ''Skybarge'' to humiliate Grigmin with his superior flying skills.<ref name="hll" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fadoop made her first and only appearance in the ''[[Star Wars Legends]]'' continuity in the novel ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'', written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1980]].<ref name="hll" />
